items.title: Tehran will never cede control of Strait of Hormuz, senior Iranian politician tells BBC
items.dek: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.
items.body: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford agrees to sell $21m private jet following outcry
items.dek: After confirming the purchase on Friday, Ford drew critcism from political opponents who called it a "gravy plane" and "out of touch".
items.body: After confirming the purchase on Friday, Ford drew critcism from political opponents who called it a "gravy plane" and "out of touch".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Widespread damage as storm spreads through midwestern US
items.dek: A series of strong winds has torn through the midwestern US, ripping roofs off homes and leaving roads obstructed.
items.body: A series of strong winds has torn through the midwestern US, ripping roofs off homes and leaving roads obstructed.
items.author: IriLine Desk
